shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Frame size remains 120x180 px for duel slot alignment.
Student mage silhouette stays readable inside the lower-left combat slot.
differences: This file carries the neutral ready stance without the reflection arc.
Robe hem and wand tip move within a 4 px breathing loop.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Ground robe silhouette, wand pose, and body proportion.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground player size 120x180 px and idle state timing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/character_player_reflector_idle_8f_6fps.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under character_player_reflector_idle_8f_6fps.
runtime_notes: Create an 8-column TextureAtlasLayout before combat begins.
Anchor the sprite origin so the front foot contacts world y=860 in every frame.
Advance frames in FixedUpdate at 6 fps using a repeating Timer component.

context.usage: Shown during round start, card selection, pass input recovery, and neutral battle beats.

shape.silhouette: Young mage in a long robe with a raised wand hand, card satchel, and stable duel stance.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet canvas is exactly 960x180 px with 8 frames.
Front foot contact stays within a 2 px vertical band across all frames.
Wand tip glow uses #00FFFF and robe trim uses #D4AF37 with no color drift.
